name: Karak
description: Solid, dependable and deadly. The Karak is a standard issue rifle in many Grineer platoons.

components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.description: Solid, dependable and deadly. The Karak is a standard issue rifle in many Grineer platoons.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the cloth ribbon on the Karak/Karak Wraith when equipped with the Desert-Camo and Conclave skin appearing distorted and behaving strangely. 
Fixed reload animation issues on the Karak/Karak Wraith when equipped with the Desert-Camo and Conclave skin.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the sound of the Kuva Karak.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U1.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Conclave Karak Skin not applying to the Karak Wraith. 
Fixed the Conclave Karak Skin not applying to all parts of the weapon.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Conclave Karak having the incorrect store icon.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not being able to trade the Dera Vandal Blueprint, Karak Wraith Blueprint, Strun Wraith Blueprint, Snipetron Vandal Blueprint/Barrel and Sheev Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Karak series damage has been increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Karak reload animations playing the wrong sound.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.1: Operation Shadow Debt.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Karak Wraith Barrel improperly being named as the Strun Wraith Barrel.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • Increase the damage of the Karak in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Karak Wraith clips giving you a surface to parkour off of.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes:
The following weapons are now available for use in Conclave:  Dera, Dera Vandal, Boltor, Boltor Prime, Tonfa, Heat Sword, Dual Heat Swords, Glaive, Glaive Prime, Kestrel, Fragor, Wraith Karak.
Karak damage increased in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes: o   KARAK WRAITH: A different take on the Grineer assault rifle, the Karak Wraith features unique styling. (If Alad V is victorious at the end of the Event.)

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons have now been balanced for use in PvP: Sybaris, Karak, Kraken, Viper, Angstrum, AKViper, WraithViper and Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Limited the max instances of Karak, Soma, and Gorgon fire sound effects.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Karak not being craftable with BluePrint.
